message:
refactor(tests): revert tkn rename to token and use descriptive test IDs in audience_token tests

Revert variable name from 'tkn' back to 'token' (more readable) and
replace generic 'root-1'/'root-2' test identifiers with descriptive
names like 'admin-user-id' for clearer test intent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
